examples: The Double Ninth cake is also known as "chrysanthemum cake" or "flower cake".
Drinking chrysanthemum is regarded as a way to prevent disasters and bad things.
A series of smaller terraces lining the east and west of the square will be adorned with local flowers such as Chrysanthemum and pansy.
